title: Hamiltonian Simulation Benchmark Result
description: Each entry captures one benchmark run for a language/hamiltonian/method/system-size configuration.

language.description: Quantum programming language or framework name.

hamiltonian.description: Target Hamiltonian for the benchmarked program.

method.description: Simulation strategy used by the implementation.

system_size.description: Problem size, typically number of spins or qubits in the lattice.

parameter_set.description: Optional numeric parameters (coupling constants, time step, trotter steps).

implementation_path.description: Relative path to the source file or entry point used for this run.

backend.description: Compiler or simulator backend identifier (e.g., AerSimulator, qiskit AerProvider, Cirq density matrix).

compilation_time_seconds.description: Measured wall-clock time for compilation / circuit generation.

execution_time_seconds.description: Optional wall-clock time for executing the circuit or simulator run.

total_gate_count.description: Total elementary gate count after compilation.

two_qubit_gate_count.description: Number of entangling (two-qubit) gates if available.

circuit_depth.description: Logical circuit depth reported by the compiler.

qubit_count.description: Number of logical qubits required by the compiled circuit.

native_gate_set.description: Native gate set used after transpilation (if known).

tool_versions.description: Key software versions (language runtime, compiler, simulator).
